name: jobseek-api-agent
title: Job Seek Agentic API Demo
description: Demonstrates the crypto paywall flow: 402 → pay ETH on Sepolia → credit token → N API calls → 402 exhausted

numCalls.title: Number of API calls
numCalls.description: How many credits to burn after payment. Price is always 0.001 ETH = 1000 credits regardless; unused credits stay on the token.

apiBaseUrl.title: API base URL
apiBaseUrl.description: Base URL of the Job Seek Agentic API.
